name: golang-github-modern-go-concurrent-dev
title: golang-github-modern-go-concurrent-dev
description:
Modern-go concurrency utilities
The modern-go/concurrent library includes a collection of concurrency
utilities:
.
* concurrent.Map: sync.Map backport for golang below 1.9.
* concurrent.Executor: goroutine with explicit ownership and cancellable.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-modern-go-concurrent-dev because Modern-go concurrency utilities.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-modern-go-concurrent-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-modern-go-concurrent-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-modern-go-concurrent-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
